JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:KAREN BAUER 3:05PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PRESENT: PLAINTIFF ASSUNTA LEONETTI AND HER COUNSEL HECTOR ORTIZ, AND DEFT WALT RUDOMETKIN AND HIS WIFE DEBORAH RUDOMETKIN, PRESENT. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF SETTLEMENT STATED ON RECORD BY PRO TEM JUDGE, AS FOLLOWS: THERE WILL BE A JUDGMENT FOR PLFF AGAINST DEFTS FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 750 RUTLAND STREET, APT. 3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, TOGETHER WITH THE AMOUNT OF $3,500. EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL MIDNIGHT OF 11/30/95. SECURITY DEPOSIT IN HANDS OF PLAINTIFF REMAINS WITH PLFF, WAIVED BY DEFTS.PROPERTY LEFT IN PREMISES AFTER THE 30TH DAY OF NOVEMBER BE CONSIDERED ABANDONED AND BE CONSIDERED PROPERTY OF PLAINTIFF. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, STAY EXECUTION TO MIDNIGHT, NOV. 30, 1995. LEASE FORFEITED AND ATTORNEY'S FEE WAIVED. DEFENDANTS AGREE ON ALL THE TERMS OF SETTLEMENT. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF SEP-13-1995, SUSTAINED 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND; NO OPPOSITION.
